articles.title: Baartman knocks Freedom down before Orcas batters complete comprehensive win

articles.title: Munro and Holder lead Knight Riders past Unicorns in 14-overs a side contest
articles.description: Lhuan-dre Pretorius hit a 28-ball 58 to give San Francisco Unicorns a solid 150 after their 14 overs, but Los Angeles Knight Riders got past the line with two balls in hand

articles.title: Lewis, Prendergast fifties in vain as Melie magic helps NZ win a thriller

articles.title: Ecclestone: 'Dean a great captain, everyone feels calm under her'
